title: Poma arceau 4 chairlift
body:
Addon for the [Minecraft Transit Railway](https://modrinth.com/mod/minecraft-transit-railway) mod:


This is an Arceau 4 chairlift, built by POMA and can be seen in many French ski resorts.
Since the MTR mod only supports detachable cable transport, I only made the detachable variants.

Contents: Arceau 4 chairlift LHT/RHT (TB grip);
_Oméga grips may come when I actually think of working on these._

Spring texture isn't clear on the pictures, but it is fixed since V1.1.

map used for showcase:
www.planetminecraft.com/project/snowy-peaks-4119136/
